findings.title: Use after free in complete_and_remove
findings.description: Task pointer dereferenced after remove_task frees the underlying memory

findings.title: Use after free via stale notification callbacks
findings.description: Global notification array retains pointers to tasks freed by remove_task, dereferenced in fire_notifications

findings.title: Double free in duplicate_and_free
findings.description: Same pointer freed twice in succession causing heap corruption

findings.title: Use after free in archive_tasks via stale archived pointers
findings.description: Pointers collected into local array before tasks are freed, then dereferenced after free in print loop

findings.title: Use after free via stale pointer after realloc failure
findings.description: Old pointer retained across realloc boundary and printed after free in failure path
